```json
  {
    "filtersByParty": {
      "$A_PARTY": {
        "cumulative": [
          {
            "identifierFilter": {
              "InterfaceFilter": {
                "value": {
                  "interfaceId": "$AN_INTERFACE_ID",
                  "includeInterfaceView": true,
                  "includeCreatedEventBlob": true
                }
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }

```
